title: calibrachoa regnellii
intro: Calibrachoa regnellii, also known as the 'Mini Petunia' or 'Brazilian Petunia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties, making it useful for treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Calibrachoa regnellii include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in homeopathic remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
